title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Swiping left from the left side of the screen navigates back through the Quick Setup Guide screens in reverse order
steps: Start from the fourth screen of the Quick Setup Guide (QSG).
Swipe left from the left side of the screen.
expected: The user navigates to the previous screen in the QSG. Specifically: fourth → third (charge case outside) → second (two earbuds) → first (one earbud).
